zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan於1314年出生在英國戴文托爾巴易布利哈姆時，他的父親Otto de Bodrugan24歲，母親Margaret Champernon25歲。他和Isabel Whalesborough至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1363年1月13日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾格朗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan于1314年出生在英国戴文托爾巴易布利哈姆时，他的父亲Otto de Bodrugan24岁，母亲Margaret Champernon25岁。他和Isabel Whalesborough至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1363年1月13日在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾格朗。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan was born in 1314, in Brixham, Torbay, Devon, England, his father, Otto de Bodrugan, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Champernon, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Isabel Whalesborough. He died on 13 January 1363, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Gorran, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan est né en 1314, à Brixham, Torbay, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Otto de Bodrugan, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Champernon, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Isabel Whalesborough. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1363, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Gorran, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan 1314 in Brixham, Torbay, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto de Bodrugan 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Champernon 25. Er hatte mit Isabel Whalesborough mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Januar 1363 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gorran, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan è nato il nel 1314 nel Brixham, Torbay, Devon, England, il suo padre, Otto de Bodrugan, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Champernon, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Isabel Whalesborough. Morì il 13 gennaio 1363, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Gorran, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bodruganが1314年にイギリスデボントルバイブリクスハムで生まれた時，父Otto de Bodruganは24歳，母Margaret Champernonは25歳であった。彼はIsabel Whalesboroughとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1363年1月13日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルゴランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan(이)가 1314년 영국 데폰 토르베이 브리스함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto de Bodrugan(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Champernon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Isabel Whalesborough(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1363년 1월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 고란에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan nasceu em 1314, em Brixham, Torbay, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Otto de Bodrugan, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Champernon, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Isabel Whalesborough. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1363, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Gorran, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan родился в 1314 г. в местности бриксхам, торбеи, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Otto de Bodrugan было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Champernon, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Isabel Whalesborough. Он умер 13 января 1363 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности горран, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan nació en 1314, en Brixham, Torbay, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Otto de Bodrugan, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Champernon, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Isabel Whalesborough. Murió el 13 de enero de 1363, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Gorran, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
